caption: The video depicts a political broadcast featuring Narendra Modi and a group of people at a gathering in Delhi. Modi is seen in a split-screen view on the left, wearing a white kurta, an orange vest, and a multicolored scarf. To his right, a group of men are seated in chairs, some wearing white clothing and orange sashes. The scene is framed by a bright orange graphic overlay. At the top, white text reads "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" alongside the lotus logo of the Bharatiya Janata Party. Smaller text indicates "प्रजानमंत्री" on the left and "दिल्ली" on the right. A bottom banner includes the text "लाइव देखें" next to a play icon and social media handles "@BJP4India" with the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Across all frames, the visual composition remains static, with no perceptible change in the people's positions, expressions, or the on-screen text.
